name_en: 🆕 Top-tier replica N63208 White Check 👏👏 Made from Damier Azur canvas, this Sarah wallet brings a fresh touch to the classic Louis Vuitton Sarah wallet. The design is simple and elegant, with an organized interior. The envelope-style flap features a snap button, revealing two large compartments, multiple card slots, and a zippered coin pocket.
name_cn:

Size: 19X10.5X2.5 cm
